payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performance model remain open questions.

entity_resolution.reason: No ambiguous entity references requiring resolution.

payload.intent: Extract durable memory about Brain architecture and current open questions.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
It is not yet decided whether Telegram should be added later.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not yet been identified.

details: Preserved 2 open questions without resolving them.

repair_options: If desired, split the architecture into separate durable decisions and open questions.
If desired, add a memory card for evaluation criteria for the model-selection question.
